description_long: This is a modern digital piano with a sleek, rectangular body and a full-length keyboard. The piano features a row of black and white keys, with a black rear panel that likely serves as a modesty board or back cover. The surface is smooth and appears to be made of plastic or composite materials, with a matte to semi-gloss finish. There are no visible pedals or additional controls on the exterior, and the design is minimalistic, focusing on the keyboard itself. The piano is compact and streamlined, suitable for placement in urban environments such as music schools, public parks, or street performance areas.
description: A sleek, modern digital piano with a full-length keyboard and a minimalist black and white design. The body is rectangular and compact, with a smooth surface and no visible pedals.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard with alternating black and white keys and a black rear panel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile and the length of the keyboard, with the keys visible along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black back panel, with no keys or controls visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and the length of the keyboard.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard keyboard layout with 52 white keys and 36 black keys, arranged in the traditional alternating pattern with no missing or split keys.
